full_text:
Wang Yi (Wendu) 王邑 (文都)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Wang Yi (王邑), styledWendu (文都). Sent to present Cao Cao with gifts following Emperor Xian’s marriage with Cao Cao’s daughters. Wang Yi was affiliated with the Han Dynasty.
